description.value: Cost: 1 or 2 Effect: Choose a trigger and an action. When the trigger occurs before your next turn, you can use your [Reaction] to perform the readied action. If the trigger does not occur you lose the readied action. Readied weaves that aren't used still consume Energy.

system.effect: Choose a trigger and an action. When the trigger occurs before your next turn, you can use your [Reaction] to perform the readied action. If the trigger does not occur you lose the readied action. Readied weaves that aren't used still consume Energy.
